hypotheses.label: I2S keeps copying enumerated switch case-constants (decoys) into the option-selector byte, pinning control onto a matching case and depleting cmplog/vpc corpora of the non-enumerated values that fall through to default; plain havoc drifts onto default freely

params.target_value: non-enumerated selector byte (W: drifts to default; observed naive selector bytes 2f,06,05)
params.decoy_value: enumerated CURLOPT case-constant (L: 0x01, all 19 cmplog instances pinned here)

hypotheses.prediction: signed_target_enrich < 0 (cmplog/vpc corpus is DEPLETED of the default-reaching non-enumerated value relative to naive) AND decoy_enrich > 0 (cmplog/vpc corpus is ENRICHED for the enumerated case-constant). An ALTERNATIVE in which I2S played no role (e.g. a pure corpus-scale or structural-assembly effect) would predict signed_target_enrich ~ 0 at this fixed single-byte offset — so a clearly negative enrichment discriminates the I2S decoy-substitution mechanism. G2: the byte-frequency measurement is over saved-corpus bytes at the gate offset, independent of which fuzzer RESOLVES default (the resolve pattern that defined the shape).

notes: Singleton i2s-anti shape (1 branch: curl/398, Curl_vsetopt switch over the CURLOPT option selector at setopt.c, default arm at line 3110). Target = curl (on-disk corpus available per data_realities; the 286 reps carry resolving_seeds+blocking_seeds, so operand_enrichment's >=3W/>=3L requirement should hold). This is a fixed-offset SINGLE-BYTE VALUE gate, so byte_freq_ratio is feasible (data_realities forbids it only for different-sized structural-assembly gates, not here) and operand_enrichment is the exact-fit registry tool for i2s literal substitution in the ANTI direction (enrich<0). REUSED rather than reinventing. No collapse needed (one branch, one mechanism). CAVEAT: the W condition is the COMPLEMENT of the enumerated case set (any non-enumerated value reaches default), not one concrete target literal; operand_enrichment scores the target side as the non-enumerated value the W seeds carry at this offset against the concrete pinned decoy 0x01 — the signal is the cmplog/vpc DEPLETION of that value plus decoy enrichment. value_profile is non-decisive here (excluded), consistent with a pure I2S substitution gate with no Hamming-gradient component, so no VP/joint descriptor is warranted. decidable:true.
